2604.11462.title: Escaping the Context Bottleneck: Active Context Curation for LLM Agents via Reinforcement Learning
2604.11462.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) struggle with long-horizon tasks due to the "context bottleneck" and the "lost-in-the-middle" phenomenon, where accumulated noise from verbose environments degrades reasoning over multi-turn interactions. To address this issue, we introduce a symbiotic framework that decouples context management from task execution. Our architecture pairs a lightweight, specialized policy model, ContextCurator, with a powerful frozen foundation model, TaskExecutor. Trained via reinforcement learning, ContextCurator actively reduces information entropy in the working memory. It aggressively prunes environmental noise while preserving reasoning anchors, that is, sparse data points that are critical for future deductions. On WebArena, our framework improves the success rate of Gemini-3.0-flash from 36.4% to 41.2% while reducing token consumption by 8.8% (from 47.4K to 43.3K). On DeepSearch, it achieves a 57.1% success rate, compared with 53.9%, while reducing token consumption by a factor of 8. Remarkably, a 7B ContextCurator matches the context management performance of GPT-4o, providing a scalable and computationally efficient paradigm for autonomous long-horizon agents.
2604.11462.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在長期任務中面臨困難，這是由於「上下文瓶頸」和「迷失於中間」現象，累積的噪音來自冗長的環境，降低了多輪互動中的推理能力。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一個共生框架，將上下文管理與任務執行解耦。我們的架構將一個輕量級的專用策略模型 ContextCurator 與一個強大的凍結基礎模型 TaskExecutor 配對。ContextCurator 通過強化學習進行訓練，主動減少工作記憶中的信息熵。它積極修剪環境噪音，同時保留推理錨點，即對未來推斷至關重要的稀疏數據點。在 WebArena 上，我們的框架將 Gemini-3.0-flash 的成功率從 36.4% 提高到 41.2%，同時將令牌消耗減少了 8.8%（從 47.4K 降至 43.3K）。在 DeepSearch 上，它的成功率達到 57.1%，相比之下之前為 53.9%，同時將令牌消耗減少了 8 倍。值得注意的是，7B 的 ContextCurator 在上下文管理性能上與 GPT-4o 相當，為自主長期代理提供了一個可擴展且計算高效的範式。
2604.11462.author: Xiaozhe Li et.al.
2604.11462.authors: Xiaozhe Li, Tianyi Lyu, Yizhao Yang, Liang Shan, Siyi Yang, Ligao Zhang, Zhuoyi Huang, Qingwen Liu, Yang Li
